title: Hadoop MapReduce Mapper Implementations
description: The 'lib/map' directory contains custom Mapper implementations for Hadoop MapReduce. InverseMapper swaps input keys and values. MultithreadedMapper enhances throughput using multithreading. TokenCounterMapper tokenizes text, emitting each word with a count. WrappedMapper allows custom Mapper.Context implementations, demonstrating Hadoop's flexibility for diverse data processing tasks within the MapReduce framework. Each Mapper serves a unique purpose, illustrating the adaptability of MapReduce for various data processing needs.
